Class DocumentRestController

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.document.DocumentRestController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1/documents") public class DocumentRestController extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DocumentRestController()

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    cancelCheckOut(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Cancel checkout (unlock without a new version).

    checkIn(Long id, org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, String comment, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Dokument einchecken (neue Version hochladen + entsperren).

    checkOut(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Dokument auschecken (sperren).

    deleteDocument(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Delete document.

    Download of the current version of a document.

    Download of a specific version of a document.

    All documents of a DocumentGroup as a DTO list.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<DocumentHistoryDTO>>
    getHistory(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Versionshistorie eines Dokuments.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<DocumentSummaryDTO>>
    getRecent(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    The 10 most recently modified documents.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<DocumentSummaryDTO>>
    search(String name, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Search documents by name.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<DocumentInfo>
    uploadDocument(Long groupId, org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, String name, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Upload of a new document into a DocumentGroup.

  • Constructor Details

    • DocumentRestController

      public DocumentRestController()

  • Method Details

    • uploadDocument

      @PostMapping(value="/upload/{groupId}", consumes="multipart/form-data") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<DocumentInfo> uploadDocument(@PathVariable Long groupId, @RequestParam("file") org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, @RequestParam("name") String name, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth) throws IOException
      Upload of a new document into a DocumentGroup. POST /api/v1/documents/upload/{groupId}
      Throws:
      IOException

    • downloadDocument

      @GetMapping("/download/{documentInfoId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<byte[]> downloadDocument(@PathVariable Long documentInfoId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Download of the current version of a document. GET /api/v1/documents/download/{documentInfoId}

    • downloadSpecificVersion

      @GetMapping("/{id}/version/{versionNumber}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<byte[]> downloadSpecificVersion(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long versionNumber, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Download of a specific version of a document. GET /api/v1/documents/{id}/version/{versionNumber}

    • getDocumentsInGroup

      @GetMapping("/group/{groupId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<DocumentSummaryDTO>> getDocumentsInGroup(@PathVariable Long groupId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      All documents of a DocumentGroup as a DTO list. GET /api/v1/documents/group/{groupId}

    • getHistory

      @GetMapping("/{id}/history") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<DocumentHistoryDTO>> getHistory(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Versionshistorie eines Dokuments. GET /api/v1/documents/{id}/history

    • deleteDocument

      @DeleteMapping("/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteDocument(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Delete document. DELETE /api/v1/documents/{id}

    • checkOut

      @PostMapping("/{id}/check-out") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> checkOut(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Dokument auschecken (sperren). POST /api/v1/documents/{id}/check-out

    • checkIn

      @PostMapping("/{id}/check-in") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<DocumentInfo> checkIn(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestParam("file") org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, @RequestParam(value="comment",required=false) String comment, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth) throws IOException
      Dokument einchecken (neue Version hochladen + entsperren). POST /api/v1/documents/{id}/check-in
      Throws:
      IOException

    • cancelCheckOut

      @PostMapping("/{id}/cancel-check-out") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> cancelCheckOut(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Cancel checkout (unlock without a new version). POST /api/v1/documents/{id}/cancel-check-out

    • search

      @GetMapping("/search") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<DocumentSummaryDTO>> search(@RequestParam String name, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Search documents by name. GET /api/v1/documents/search?name=...

    • getRecent

      @GetMapping("/recent") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<DocumentSummaryDTO>> getRecent(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      The 10 most recently modified documents. GET /api/v1/documents/recent
